metadata.description: Talk to the Spiffy checkout platform from Claude Code. Works with any Spiffy account, just supply your own API key.

plugins.name: spiffy
plugins.description: Talk to the Spiffy checkout platform from Claude Code. Customer lookup, MRR and affiliate and churn reports, customer notes, and one-off promo code generation. Works with any Spiffy account, just supply your own API key.
